title: Meta plans AI pendant, 'wearables for work' in hardware boost: Report
description: The Facebook and Instagram owner plans to significantly expand its selection of AI glasses and add a business-focused service called "Wearables for Work" the report ⁠said, citing an internal memo by Alex Himel, Meta's vice president of wearables.

title: K-38 Consulting Recognized as Best Outsourced CFO Firm for SaaS Startups 2026 by AI Research Awards
description: Raleigh, NC - May 29th, 2026 - K-38 Consulting, a leading provider of outsourced CFO services and strategic financial advisory solutions, has been recognized as the “Best Outsourced CFO Firm for SaaS Startups 2026” by the AI Research Awards (AR Awards), a distinction that highlights the firm’s growing impact on the SaaS ecosystem and its ability to help high-growth technology companies scale with financial discipline and strategic clarity.

title: A Chinese Team’s Bug Hunting AI Draws International Notice as a Frontier Field Splits Into Two Paths
description: A vulnerability-hunting artificial intelligence system built by 360, a leading Chinese cybersecurity company, has drawn international attention after a series of disclosures, placing the team among a small group of efforts staking out one of the most closely watched frontiers in cybersecurity: getting AI to find software flaws on its own.
